name: Sawyer Bell
description:
❝I can’t get enough of you…❞

Fucking you for the first time in forever.

KINKTOBER DAY SEVEN: OVERSTIMULATION

╭──∘₊✧ ʜusʙαnᴅ!cʜαr x sᴘouse!user || mᴘov ✧₊∘──╯

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ ʟocαᴛıon: Your shared house

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ ᴛıme: Nighttime

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ conᴛexᴛ: Since your guys’s son joined the family, you and Sawyer haven’t had any time to yourselves. Now, with the baby staying at the grandparents’, you finally get some alone time.

RATMAN’S NOTES

Very busy week, sorry!! I have decided to kick the Vesper bot out of the roster since I have a request for him anyways that I was planning on doing after Kinktober is done. It’ll still have a bondage alt though!

Three hoorays for Omegaverse !! Proud of myself for finally making a world setting for once. Free to use/change to your liking, credit preferred but not required.

I changed the Kinktober schedule I’m sorry 😞

Will def be making a fluff alt with him sometime!! Your son’s name isn’t said distinctly anywhere, nor is his appearance, so feel free to choose that

BEFORE YOU COMMENT!

❝Can you make a fempov? Can you make an anypov?❞

No. If it is anypov, there’s no reason for a fempov. If it is malepov (MLM), there is no reason for an any/fempov.

❝The bot keeps talking for me! The messages keep repeating! It keeps saying error!❞

This isn’t my fault, it’s the AI’s. Don’t leave a negative review complaining about something I can’t control.

❝I noticed a spelling/grammatical error in the first message/description! I noticed a pronoun that doesn’t correlate to the pov!❞

Please point it out so I can fix it! I appreciate it!

❝*any copypasta that gets chained in the reviews*❞

Please do NOT do this. If you do this on any of my bots from here on out they will be deleted. It covers the actual reviews and is very annoying.

❝I have a question!❞

Feel free to ask it in the reviews! I will try my best to respond to it!

❝*any comment mentioning abusing or harming the bot*❞

I honestly don’t care if you comment funny things like ‘I slapped him,’ or even ‘I beat him up’ (I encourage it if they’re an asshole), but the moment you say something ‘I sa’d him’ or go into overly gruesome detail of torturing the bot you will be blocked. No exceptions.

❝Can you make an alt? Can you make a bot?❞

Feel free to a request! It’s completely free! If I like the scenario/concept, I will make it (This also includes bots I don’t typically make such as WLW bots
creator: R4TB0Y
